channel.title: Networking on wcloud-lab
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on wcloud-lab

item.title: Networking
item.description: Cilium, MetalLB, Gateway API, Tailscale, and a 200 Gbps RDMA interconnect.

item.title: My RDMA Journey with DGX Spark
item.description: Why I bought two DGX Sparks, what RDMA actually is, and where I’m at with getting it working in Kubernetes.

item.title: SR-IOV on Talos: Why the Operator Doesn't Work
item.description: The SR-IOV Network Operator crashes on Talos Linux. Here’s the standalone device plugin I built instead.
